# graph-tool-call

> LLM 에이전트를 위한 그래프 기반 도구 검색 엔진.

## 문서

- 홈: https://sonaiengine.github.io/graph-tool-call/ko/
- 빠른 시작: https://sonaiengine.github.io/graph-tool-call/ko/getting-started/quickstart/
- OpenAPI 컬렉션: https://sonaiengine.github.io/graph-tool-call/ko/guides/openapi-collections/
- XGEN 통합: https://sonaiengine.github.io/graph-tool-call/ko/guides/xgen-integration/
- Public API: https://sonaiengine.github.io/graph-tool-call/ko/reference/public-api/
- 벤치마크: https://sonaiengine.github.io/graph-tool-call/ko/validation/benchmarks/

## 패키지

- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/graph-tool-call/
- Source: https://github.com/SonAIengine/graph-tool-call

## 요약

graph-tool-call은 OpenAPI, MCP, Python function source에서 tool graph를 만듭니다.
keyword retrieval, graph expansion, semantic metadata, contract evidence, target
selection, plan diagnostics, scrubbed trace learning을 사용해 LLM agent가 대형 tool
catalog에서 필요한 tool을 더 잘 고르고 사용할 수 있게 돕습니다.
